items.title: Trump unsure on Iran deal amid Strait of Hormuz tensions
items.desc:
Trump's indecision on Iran deal heightens geopolitical instability, risking prolonged disruption in global oil trade through the Strait.
The post Trump unsure on Iran deal amid Strait of Hormuz tensions appeared first on Crypto Briefing.

items.title: Fed minutes: Officials deeply divided over future path of US inflation
items.desc: A Federal Reserve rate-setting committee agreed to keep its key rate unchanged at its meeting last month, though most officials were split over whether inflation is likely to stay elevated or whether it will cool once the Iran war winds down, according to min…

items.title: Nearly 83,000 ha Assam land under four neighbouring states’ control: Assam min Atul Bora
items.desc: Assam minister Atul Bora says 82,751.86 hectares in 18 districts are under control of Nagaland, Arunachal, Meghalaya and Mizoram; talks and pacts ongoing.

items.title: DDA opens online application for TOD projects
items.desc: Delhi Development Authority opens online applications for revised TOD projects, offering single-window, time-bound approvals and consolidated fees for 207 sq km corridors.

items.title: Assam govt trying to resolve farmers’ registration issue: Agri minister
items.desc: Assam govt to expand farmer registration: 31 lakh registered; 18.59 lakh on PM-KISAN, 13.02 lakh on Farmer Registry; land record digitisation delays addressed.

items.title: Speeding tanker crushes auto at Ghodbunder signal, kills two, injures 1
items.desc: Speeding gas tanker jumps Ghodbunder signal near D-Mart, overturns onto autorickshaw, killing two and injuring one; driver flees as police launch search.

items.title: Three teenagers drown in rainwater-filled quarry in Jalgaon
items.desc: Three teens aged 14 and 17 drowned while swimming in a rainwater-filled quarry in Amalner; police registered an accidental death case and are investigating.

items.title: Justin Verlander named to All-Star Game, announces he’ll retire at season’s end
items.desc: The Tigers great was named a Legends Pick to the All-Star Game, and announced he’ll retire at season’s end.

items.title: Dombivli hospital attack: Sena corporator arrested, complains of chest pain, hospitalised; doctors call off strike
items.desc: Vishnu Nagar police arrest Shiv Sena corporator Ramesh Mhatre, 3 others for assault on doctors at KDMC Shastri Nagar Hospital; protests disrupt OPDs.

items.title: Oil surges as Strait of Hormuz faces full conflict conditions
items.desc:
Escalating tensions at the Strait of Hormuz could lead to sustained high oil prices, impacting global economies and energy markets significantly.
The post Oil surges as Strait of Hormuz faces full conflict conditions appeared first on Crypto Briefing.

items.title: No Khalaili breakthrough for Inter, new €23m plus bonus offer rejected
items.desc: Inter have reportedly now had two offers for Anan Khalaili rejected, as they are still nowhere near the €30m asking price set by Union Saint-Gilloise, while Galatasaray now go for Liverpool’s Curtis Jones.

items.title: Accused cartel boss living secret bloodthirsty life in wealthy California city — as feds make terrifying discovery
items.desc: A world of golden guns, heaps of cash and loads of drugs has been revealed in a wealthy SoCal city.

items.title: Godavari swells in Nashik, small temples submerged
items.desc: Godavari river swells in Nashik after heavy rains, submerging small temples near Ramkund; water nears Dutondya Maruti as officials issue alerts.

items.title: Assam-Bangladesh border: 228km fenced, 38km still unfenced, govt tells assembly
items.desc: Assam Assembly told 228km of the 276km Assam-Bangladesh border is fenced, with 38km unfenced; CCTV, 14 BSF checkposts monitor vulnerable riverine stretches.

items.title: Maharashtra University of Health Sciences postpones all exams scheduled for July 9 due to heavy rainfall
items.desc: MUHS Nashik postpones all university exams scheduled for July 9 across Maharashtra due to heavy rainfall and transport disruption; revised dates to be announced.

items.title: Prince Harry’s failed legal battle leaves behind staggering $67M in costs
items.desc: The years-long court case is "one of the most expensive media privacy actions in recent years," according to an expert.

items.title: Madurai corporation commissioner imposes fine on shopkeepers for using plastic bags
items.desc: Madurai commissioner Gaurav Kumar inspects Mela Anuppanadi shops, warns against banned plastic carry bags, fines violators Rs 11,200, orders monitoring and eviction of encroachments.

items.title: Heavy rain forces MSRTC to cancel 250 bus trips across Nashik district, losses mount
items.desc: Heavy rain in Nashik disrupts MSRTC services as 250 bus trips are cancelled, routes suspended and diverted; losses exceed Rs 4 lakh, after 794 trips Tuesday.

items.title: Trump Says US Will Let Ukraine Make Patriot Missiles
items.desc:
US President Donald Trump said he will allow Ukraine to manufacture Patriot missile interceptors, a key weapon in repelling Russian attacks. #trump #ukraine #russia #politics #worldnews #turkey 
“We’re going to be giving a license to you,” Trump said, sitting…

items.title: Eroğan hails Ankara NATO summit as historic success
items.desc: President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan said on July 8 that the NATO summit in Ankara had been completed successfully, describing the gathering as a historic meeting that would help shape the alliance’s future at a time of growing Euro-Atlantic security challenges.
